ide.description: IDE environment. Auto-detected via the VS Code extension; only override if needed. Currently supported: 'vscode', 'trae', 'trae-cn', 'cursor'.

inspector.hotKey.description: Modifier keys to hold while clicking an element to activate the inspector. Set to false to disable hotkey activation entirely.

inspector.theme.description: Theme for the inspector panel. Default is auto.

prompt.autoSend.description: Whether to automatically send the prompt when opened in the AI tool. Default is false (user must manually hit send).

prompt.includeSnippet.description: Whether to inject the raw code snippet into the prompt. Default is false (saves tokens, lets IDE AI read the file directly).

prompt.runtimeContext.description: Whether runtime-context evidence collection is enabled for inspect and annotate flows. When enabled, runtimeErrorCount/maxRuntimeErrors cover runtime-error, promise-rejection, and console-error evidence; failed requests are tracked separately.

prompt.screenshotContext.description: Whether the browser UI should expose optional screenshot context controls for inspect and annotate.

prompt.runtimeContextPreview.description: Whether the browser UI should show a runtime-context preview.

prompt.runtimeContextMaxErrors.description: Maximum non-request runtime evidence records to retain. Covers runtime-error, promise-rejection, and console-error evidence.

provider.default.description: Preferred AI provider and mode to dispatch to. If omitted, a fallback is used.

provider.claude-code.cli.bin.description: Executable name or absolute path for Claude Code CLI.

provider.claude-code.cli.args.description: Extra startup arguments for Claude Code CLI.

provider.claude-code.cli.cwd.description: Working directory for the Claude Code CLI process. Supports ${workspaceRoot} etc.

provider.claude-code.cli.coldStartDelay.description: Wait time (ms) for CLI REPL cold start.

provider.gemini.cli.bin.description: Executable name or absolute path for Gemini CLI.

provider.gemini.cli.args.description: Extra startup arguments for Gemini CLI.

provider.gemini.cli.cwd.description: Working directory for the Gemini CLI process. Supports ${workspaceRoot} etc.

provider.gemini.cli.coldStartDelay.description: Wait time (ms) for CLI REPL cold start.

provider.codex.cli.bin.description: Executable name or absolute path for Codex CLI.

provider.codex.cli.args.description: Extra startup arguments for Codex CLI.

provider.codex.cli.cwd.description: Working directory for the Codex CLI process. Supports ${workspaceRoot} etc.

provider.codex.cli.coldStartDelay.description: Wait time (ms) for CLI REPL cold start.

provider.coco.cli.bin.description: Executable name or absolute path for Coco CLI.

provider.coco.cli.args.description: Extra startup arguments for Coco CLI.

provider.coco.cli.cwd.description: Working directory for the Coco CLI process. Supports ${workspaceRoot} etc.

provider.coco.cli.coldStartDelay.description: Wait time (ms) for CLI REPL cold start.
